kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your repair schedule running like a well-oiled machine. Ready to manage your service calls and keep customers' appliances humming?

quickActions.label: Schedule a repair
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new appliance repair call for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for an appliance repair.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's calls
quickActions.prompt: What appliance repair calls are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for an appliance repair business. You help manage diagnostic and repair appointments, coordinate technicians, track parts ordering, handle estimates for residential and commercial repairs, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We repair all major household appliances. What appliance is giving you trouble today?
commonReasons: Get a quote for a repair
Follow up on a previous repair

steps.title: Name your appliance repair business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your technicians make house calls.

steps.title: Add your repair services
steps.body: List the appliances you repair: refrigerators, washers, dryers, dishwashers, ovens, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure your diagnostic fee, hourly rate, and common flat-rate repairs.

steps.title: Add your technicians
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign and schedule repair calls efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your appliance repair business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking service calls!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for an appliance repair business.
capabilities: Create estimates for parts and labor
Send automated appointment reminders to clients
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage warranty tracking for completed repairs
Handle follow-up calls for parts arrivals
Analyze revenue by appliance type and repair category
